issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill is specific to Python and may not work with non-Python AI agents.

scenarios.name: Guaranteed-valid review analysis JSON from a local Llama model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses outlines.models.transformers plus outlines.generate.json(model, ReviewAnalysis) with Pydantic Field constraints (ge/le/min_length/max_length) for first-try validity, while baseline falls back to free-text prompts plus retry/json.loads parsing.

scenarios.name: Spam classifier and US phone number formatter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses outlines.generate.choice(model, ["spam", "ham", "uncertain"]) and outlines.generate.regex with the documented r"\(\d{3}\) \d{3}-\d{4}" pattern, while baseline emits prompt instructions and post-hoc regex validation that can still produce invalid strings.
